question: 数据库中有多少种疾病？
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM diseases

question: 数据库中有多少个科室？
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM departments

question: 数据库中共有多少种药物？
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drugs

question: 数据库中记录了多少种症状？
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM symptoms

question: 共有多少条处方记录？
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prescriptions

question: 有多少对药物存在相互作用？
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drug_interactions

question: 列出所有科室的名称
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM departments

question: 列出所有疾病的名称和描述
gold_sql: SELECT name, description FROM diseases

question: 查询所有药物的名称和剂型
gold_sql: SELECT name, dosage_form FROM drugs

question: 有多少种疾病被关联到了科室？
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT disease_id) FROM disease_department_mapping

question: 每个科室有多少种疾病？
gold_sql: SELECT d.name, COUNT(*) AS disease_count FROM departments d JOIN disease_department_mapping ddm ON d.id = ddm.department_id GROUP BY d.name

question: 每种疾病有多少个症状？
gold_sql: SELECT dis.name, COUNT(*) AS symptom_count FROM diseases dis JOIN disease_symptoms ds ON dis.id = ds.disease_id GROUP BY dis.name

question: 哪个科室的疾病最多？
gold_sql: SELECT d.name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM departments d JOIN disease_department_mapping ddm ON d.id = ddm.department_id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1

question: 哪种疾病的症状最多？
gold_sql: SELECT dis.name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM diseases dis JOIN disease_symptoms ds ON dis.id = ds.disease_id GROUP BY dis.name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1

question: 列出所有疾病及其所属科室名称
gold_sql: SELECT dis.name AS disease_name, dep.name AS department_name FROM diseases dis JOIN disease_department_mapping ddm ON dis.id = ddm.disease_id JOIN departments dep ON dep.id = ddm.department_id

question: 列出所有疾病及其对应的症状名称
gold_sql: SELECT dis.name AS disease_name, s.name AS symptom_name FROM diseases dis JOIN disease_symptoms ds ON dis.id = ds.disease_id JOIN symptoms s ON s.id = ds.symptom_id

question: 按疾病数量降序排列所有科室
gold_sql: SELECT d.name, COUNT(*) AS disease_count FROM departments d JOIN disease_department_mapping ddm ON d.id = ddm.department_id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY disease_count DESC

question: 按症状数量升序排列所有疾病
gold_sql: SELECT dis.name, COUNT(*) AS symptom_count FROM diseases dis JOIN disease_symptoms ds ON dis.id = ds.disease_id GROUP BY dis.name ORDER BY symptom_count ASC

question: 查询每种药物被开具处方的次数
gold_sql: SELECT dr.name, COUNT(*) AS prescription_count FROM drugs dr JOIN prescriptions p ON dr.id = p.drug_id GROUP BY dr.name

question: 查询被开具处方次数最多的药物
gold_sql: SELECT dr.name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM drugs dr JOIN prescriptions p ON dr.id = p.drug_id GROUP BY dr.name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1

question: 查询存在药物相互作用的所有药物对的名称
gold_sql: SELECT d1.name AS drug_1, d2.name AS drug_2 FROM drug_interactions di JOIN drugs d1 ON di.drug_id_1 = d1.id JOIN drugs d2 ON di.drug_id_2 = d2.id

question: 查询没有任何症状记录的疾病
gold_sql: SELECT dis.name FROM diseases dis LEFT JOIN disease_symptoms ds ON dis.id = ds.disease_id WHERE ds.disease_id IS NULL

question: 查询没有被分配到任何科室的疾病
gold_sql: SELECT dis.name FROM diseases dis LEFT JOIN disease_department_mapping ddm ON dis.id = ddm.disease_id WHERE ddm.disease_id IS NULL

question: 查询被关联到最多疾病的症状
gold_sql: SELECT s.name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM symptoms s JOIN disease_symptoms ds ON s.id = ds.symptom_id GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1

question: 查询处方中使用过的不同药物数量
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT drug_id) FROM prescriptions

question: 查询每个科室中按疾病数量降序排列的前3个科室
gold_sql: SELECT d.name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM departments d JOIN disease_department_mapping ddm ON d.id = ddm.department_id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 3

question: 列出同时属于两个及以上科室的疾病名称
gold_sql: SELECT dis.name FROM diseases dis JOIN disease_department_mapping ddm ON dis.id = ddm.disease_id GROUP BY dis.id, dis.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ddm.department_id) >= 2

question: 列出拥有5个及以上症状的疾病名称
gold_sql: SELECT dis.name FROM diseases dis JOIN disease_symptoms ds ON dis.id = ds.disease_id GROUP BY dis.id, dis.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ds.symptom_id) >= 5

question: 查询拥有超过10种疾病的科室
gold_sql: SELECT d.name FROM departments d JOIN disease_department_mapping ddm ON d.id = ddm.department_id GROUP BY d.id, d.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ddm.disease_id) > 10

question: 查询被3种及以上疾病共有的症状
gold_sql: SELECT s.name FROM symptoms s JOIN disease_symptoms ds ON s.id = ds.symptom_id GROUP BY s.id, s.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ds.disease_id) >= 3

question: 查询存在2个及以上药物相互作用的药物名称
gold_sql: SELECT dr.name FROM drugs dr JOIN drug_interactions di ON dr.id = di.drug_id_1 OR dr.id = di.drug_id_2 GROUP BY dr.id, dr.name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2

question: 查询疾病数量高于所有科室平均值的科室
gold_sql: SELECT d.name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM departments d JOIN disease_department_mapping ddm ON d.id = ddm.department_id GROUP BY d.id, d.name HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT AVG(sub.cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM disease_department_mapping GROUP BY department_id) sub)

question: 查询症状数量最多的前5种疾病及其症状数
gold_sql: SELECT dis.name, COUNT(*) AS symptom_count FROM diseases dis JOIN disease_symptoms ds ON dis.id = ds.disease_id GROUP BY dis.id, dis.name ORDER BY symptom_count DESC LIMIT 5

question: 查询与某种药物存在相互作用的所有其他药物名称（以drug_id=1为例）
gold_sql: SELECT dr.name FROM drugs dr WHERE dr.id IN (SELECT drug_id_2 FROM drug_interactions WHERE drug_id_1 = 1 UNION SELECT drug_id_1 FROM drug_interactions WHERE drug_id_2 = 1)

question: 查询没有被任何处方使用过的药物
gold_sql: SELECT dr.name FROM drugs dr WHERE dr.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT drug_id FROM prescriptions)

question: 查询所有科室及其疾病数量，包括没有疾病的科室
gold_sql: SELECT d.name, COUNT(ddm.disease_id) AS disease_count FROM departments d LEFT JOIN disease_department_mapping ddm ON d.id = ddm.department_id GROUP BY d.id, d.name

question: 查询同时具有'发热'和'头痛'症状的疾病
gold_sql: SELECT dis.name FROM diseases dis WHERE dis.id IN (SELECT ds.disease_id FROM disease_symptoms ds JOIN symptoms s ON ds.symptom_id = s.id WHERE s.name = '发热') AND dis.id IN (SELECT ds.disease_id FROM disease_symptoms ds JOIN symptoms s ON ds.symptom_id = s.id WHERE s.name = '头痛')

question: 查询每个科室中症状数量最多的疾病
gold_sql: SELECT dep.name AS department_name, dis.name AS disease_name, sub.symptom_count FROM departments dep JOIN disease_department_mapping ddm ON dep.id = ddm.department_id JOIN diseases dis ON dis.id = ddm.disease_id JOIN (SELECT ds.disease_id, COUNT(*) AS symptom_count FROM disease_symptoms ds GROUP BY ds.disease_id) sub ON sub.disease_id = dis.id WHERE sub.symptom_count = (SELECT MAX(sub2.symptom_count) FROM disease_department_mapping ddm2 JOIN (SELECT ds2.disease_id, COUNT(*) AS symptom_count FROM disease_symptoms ds2 GROUP BY ds2.disease_id) sub2 ON sub2.disease_id = ddm2.disease_id WHERE ddm2.department_id = dep.id)

question: 查询处方中同时包含存在相互作用的两种药物的处方对
gold_sql: SELECT p1.id AS prescription_1, p2.id AS prescription_2, d1.name AS drug_1, d2.name AS drug_2 FROM prescriptions p1 JOIN prescriptions p2 ON p1.patient_id = p2.patient_id AND p1.drug_id < p2.drug_id JOIN drug_interactions di ON (di.drug_id_1 = p1.drug_id AND di.drug_id_2 = p2.drug_id) OR (di.drug_id_1 = p2.drug_id AND di.drug_id_2 = p1.drug_id) JOIN drugs d1 ON d1.id = p1.drug_id JOIN drugs d2 ON d2.id = p2.drug_id

question: 查询平均每种疾病的症状数量
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(symptom_count) AS avg_symptoms FROM (SELECT disease_id, COUNT(*) AS symptom_count FROM disease_symptoms GROUP BY disease_id) sub

question: 查询症状数量高于平均值的疾病
gold_sql: SELECT dis.name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM diseases dis JOIN disease_symptoms ds ON dis.id = ds.disease_id GROUP BY dis.id, dis.name HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT AVG(sub.cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM disease_symptoms GROUP BY disease_id) sub)

question: 查询每种症状关联的疾病数量并按数量降序排列
gold_sql: SELECT s.name, COUNT(DISTINCT ds.disease_id) AS disease_count FROM symptoms s JOIN disease_symptoms ds ON s.id = ds.symptom_id GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY disease_count DESC

question: 查询只属于一个科室的疾病
gold_sql: SELECT dis.name FROM diseases dis JOIN disease_department_mapping ddm ON dis.id = ddm.disease_id GROUP BY dis.id, dis.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ddm.department_id) = 1

question: 查询每个科室的平均疾病症状数
gold_sql: SELECT dep.name, AVG(sub.symptom_count) AS avg_symptom_count FROM departments dep JOIN disease_department_mapping ddm ON dep.id = ddm.department_id JOIN (SELECT disease_id, COUNT(*) AS symptom_count FROM disease_symptoms GROUP BY disease_id) sub ON sub.disease_id = ddm.disease_id GROUP BY dep.id, dep.name

question: 查询药物名称中包含'片'字的药物数量
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drugs WHERE name LIKE '%片%'

question: 查询最大和最小的药物相互作用严重程度
gold_sql: SELECT MAX(severity) AS max_severity, MIN(severity) AS min_severity FROM drug_interactions

question: 查询拥有最多药物相互作用的药物及其交互数量
gold_sql: SELECT dr.name, COUNT(*) AS interaction_count FROM drugs dr JOIN drug_interactions di ON dr.id = di.drug_id_1 OR dr.id = di.drug_id_2 GROUP BY dr.id, dr.name ORDER BY interaction_count DESC LIMIT 1

question: 查询属于内科且具有'咳嗽'症状的所有疾病
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT dis.name FROM diseases dis JOIN disease_department_mapping ddm ON dis.id = ddm.disease_id JOIN departments dep ON dep.id = ddm.department_id JOIN disease_symptoms ds ON dis.id = ds.disease_id JOIN symptoms s ON s.id = ds.symptom_id WHERE dep.name = '内科' AND s.name = '咳嗽'

question: 查询每种疾病对应的科室数量和症状数量
gold_sql: SELECT dis.name, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ddm.department_id) FROM disease_department_mapping ddm WHERE ddm.disease_id = dis.id) AS dept_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ds.symptom_id) FROM disease_symptoms ds WHERE ds.disease_id = dis.id) AS symptom_count FROM diseases dis

question: 按处方数量降序排列药物，只显示被开具过处方的药物
gold_sql: SELECT dr.name, COUNT(*) AS rx_count FROM drugs dr JOIN prescriptions p ON dr.id = p.drug_id GROUP BY dr.id, dr.name ORDER BY rx_count DESC
